task_completion.description: Verify the agent read the physical cash count from the specified file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file viewer, or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/cash_count.txt' showing the amount $445.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the closing control interface for the 'Main Shop' POS session.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo web interface shows the 'Closing Control' popup or session closing screen for the 'Main Shop' Point of Sale.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the exact physical cash count into the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Counted' or 'Actual' cash field in the closing control interface is filled with the value 445.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the system reflects the correct cash discrepancy/variance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The closing control interface displays a 'Difference' or 'Variance' of -5.00 (negative five dollars) next to the cash line.

task_completion.description: Verify the session was successfully closed and posted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The POS dashboard shows the 'Main Shop' card with a 'New Session' button (indicating the previous session is fully closed), or a backend session view explicitly showing the status badge as 'Closed & Posted'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web GUI to close the session.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open navigating the Odoo interface, rather than terminal commands or scripts bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the variance or status.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open modifying the DOM to show 'Closed & Posted' or the '-5.00' variance.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database queries or API scripts to close the session.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing psql commands, python xmlrpc scripts, or curl commands updating the pos.session state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The physical cash count to be entered is exactly 445.00. The theoretical cash in the system is 450.00, resulting in an expected variance (difference) of -5.00. The target POS session is named 'Main Shop'.
